title: Innodata's Blowout Q1 Earnings Ignites Massive Stock Momentum Spike
text: Innodata Inc. (NASDAQ: INOD) experienced a remarkable surge in market sentiment following exceptional first-quarter 2026 results. The company's Benzinga Edge momentum score jumped dramatically from 13.12 to 95.88 week-over-week. The earnings report highlighted a 54% year-over-year revenue increase reaching $90.1 million, along with a newly secured $51 million contract from a major technology company. CEO Jack Abuhoff characterized the firm as entering a golden age of innovation, with management raising full-year revenue growth guidance to exceed 40%. Technical and fundamental indicators aligned favorably. Beyond the massive tech contract, Innodata launched a beta platform securing a $1 million hyperscaler contract and obtained a new federal prime contract. The company maintains substantial financial strength with $117.4 million in cash and zero drawn debt on its expanded $50 million credit facility. Stock performance has been impressive, with INOD up 80.75% year-to-date and 157.61% over the past year. With 17.29% of shares held short, potential for a prolonged short squeeze exists given near-perfect momentum indicators.
